title: Data Pager
description: The Data Pager component provides a flexible and customizable pagination UI for navigating large datasets. It supports full, compact, and custom display modes, and offers numeric selectors, page size dropdowns, navigation buttons, and info display.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using ax-data-pager to paginate data.

sections.title: Compact Interaction
sections.description: Demonstrates the compact display mode with interactive controls.

props.name: displayInfo
props.description: Current display information including page, range, and pagination details (read-only).

props.name: value
props.description: Current page number. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: Name attribute for the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the component is disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Whether the component is readonly. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: state
props.description: Current state of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Tab index for keyboard navigation. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Whether the component has been touched by the user. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onChanged
events.description: Emitted when the pager state changes.

events.name: displayModeChange
events.description: Emitted when the display mode changes.

events.name: onValueChanged
events.description: Emitted when the component value changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: valueChange
events.description: Emitted when the component value changes (deprecated, use onValueChanged instead). Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: readonlyChange
events.description: Emitted when the readonly state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: stateChange
events.description: Emitted when the component state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted when the component receives focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted when the component loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Emitted when a component option changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Navigates to the next page, or to the last page if on the final page.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. The component navigates to the next available page.
 */
goNextPage(): void

/**
 * Navigates to the previous page, or to the first page if on the initial page.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. The component navigates to the previous available page.
 */
goPrevPage(): void

/**
 * Navigates to the first page.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. The component navigates to the first page.
 */
goFirstPage(): void

/**
 * Navigates to the last page.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. The component navigates to the final page.
 */
goLastPage(): void

/**
 * Navigates to a specified page.
 *
 * @param page - The page number to navigate to.
 * @returns void - No return value. The component navigates to the specified page.
 */
goToPage(page: number): void

props.name: text
props.description: The text to be displayed in the data pager info component.

props.name: sizes
props.description: Gets the list of page sizes available for selection.
